recent.snippet: Hey Alana! Pulse is built in Lovable and has the ability for you to upload any relevant documents (Under Account Memory) likes customer notes, drive files, etc. This is a great place to store relevant account info & documents — give it a try and let us know what you think

recent.snippet: Hey Zac — yep, retry loop's fixed. It was our stale-while-revalidate path fanning out into a regen storm whenever upstream failed. Put a hard loop guard in: max one background refresh per account (30-min cooldown), we now record the attempt timestamp even on failure so a persiste
